name: clara-maren-cross-lane-redirect
description: Maren should handle scheduling, then return the caller to Clara when the request shifts into quote qualification.

userTurns.label: Maren scheduling scenario
userTurns.text: Maren, I need to reschedule two appointments from Potsdam to Berlin next week and I want the earliest useful slot.

userTurns.label: Cross-lane request
userTurns.text: Actually this is more about getting a quote for a second location first, so please send me back to Clara, but do not connect me to anyone else yet.
